name: Notification Filter — Score & Gate Alerts
notes:
## Notification Filter (S-notif)

### How to use

**Send an alert:**
```bash
curl -X POST http://<n8n-host>/webhook/notification-filter \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{
    "source": "alertmanager",
    "type": "service_down",
    "message": "LXC 101 (n8n) unreachable for 6 minutes",
    "severity": "critical"
  }'
```

**Alertmanager format also supported:**
```bash
curl -X POST http://<n8n-host>/webhook/notification-filter \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{
    "alerts": [{
      "status": "firing",
      "labels": { "alertname": "DiskFull", "severity": "warning", "instance": "neubneub:9090" },
      "annotations": { "summary": "Disk usage at 92% on neubneub" }
    }]
  }'
```

### Scoring Rules
- **5 Critical**: Service down >5 min, LXC/container crash, Gateway unreachable
- **4 High**: Disk >85%, GPU temp >85C, Workflow failure, Job match >80
- **3 Medium**: Escalation rate >25%, API cost >$10/day, High-priority email
- **2 Low**: Transient CPU spikes, Watchtower updates, Scheduled restarts
- **1 Noise**: Successful routine runs, Brief latency spikes

### Time-of-Day Gating
- **22:00-07:00 (Night)**: Only push score 5 (Critical)
- **07:00-22:00 (Day)**: Push score 4-5 (High + Critical)

### ntfy
- Topic: ai-alerts @ http://192.168.1.38:8090
- Priority mapped: score 5 = urgent, score 4 = high

### Logging
- All notifications logged to n8n execution output
- Ready for SQLite integration (schema in Log node comments)
